{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323155816DB22771E25414BCEC388"}"},"total":27},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615909932340364056","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，剧情幽默搞笑，不是大男主爽文，作者大大加油！推荐一下。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773220014,"group_id":"7585578423813147710","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这人很懒，没有留下只言片语。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+pcLeNFHzn2E9kWOWBRzB0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c24def20d1514f649615996d22796c64~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795100&x-signature=3oTV24e2Xh7H1MANLshXtNT08II%3D","user_id":"4338483681","user_name":"闫可甜可咸"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4338483681","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7585578423813147710","book_info":{"abstract":"陈元本是普普通通的蓝星人，意外穿越至修仙界，获得无敌天资和大道之体，在山沟沟里躲到无敌。
那天他站在仙界最高的山，感慨无敌的寂寞。
无趣之下，他选择进入凡间游历一番。
仙宗大比之中，他以大欺小盖压宗门天才。
“我也是年轻人，参加大比怎么了？”
遗迹重宝现世，他以无敌的实力暴力解决阴谋，直接拿走了宝物。
“别这么看我，小心我给你好果子吃。”
域外魔族入侵，他一剑斩出，万魔哀嚎。
“妖孽吃我一剑!”
